command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== NATS STATE on vm-ecosystem ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.203 '
echo "NATS container:"
docker inspect moreno-nats 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)[0]
cfg=d.get("Config",{})
print("Image:",cfg.get("Image"))
print("Cmd:",cfg.get("Cmd"))
ports=d.get("NetworkSettings",{}).get("Ports",{})
print("Ports:",list(ports.keys()))
" 2>/dev/null || echo "docker inspect failed"

echo "NATS port test:"
curl -s http://localhost:8222/varz 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("version:",d.get("version"))
print("uptime:",d.get("uptime"))
print("subscriptions:",d.get("subscriptions",0))
print("connections:",d.get("connections",0))
print("total_connections:",d.get("total_connections",0))
" 2>/dev/null || echo "NATS http not available on localhost:8222"
' 2>&1

echo '=== RUNTIME REGISTRY ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime_registry.yaml" 2>&1 | head -60

echo '=== AGENT DIRS ON vm-hermes ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.202 '
ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null
cat /home/jose/hermes/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "no hermes config"
' 2>&1

echo '=== AGENT DIRS ON vm-openclaw ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.199 '
ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
' 2>&1

echo '=== MORENO-AI AGENTS DIR ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/agents/ 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo DONE_1996
